data.title: HTX DAO Ambassador attended the Hong Kong RWA Investment and Financing Conference to discuss DAO governance and RWA
data.description:
On May 22, HTX DAO Ambassador Molly was invited to attend the 2025 RWA International Investment and Financing Conference in Hong Kong, and expounded HTX DAO's views on the theme of RWA. Coinciding with the recent formal passage of the Stablecoin Bill by the Legislative Council of Hong Kong, the invitation to attend the conference reflects the important position of HTX DAO in the industry and the key deployment of Hong Kong as an international financial center for the decentralized ecosystem.

Molly pointed out that we are currently at a historical turning point where the old financial order is accelerating its deconstruction and the new system is being rebuilt. "Crypto is not a technological invention, it is a movement to reconstruct the financial power structure." At a time when the centralized system of traditional finance with SWIFT, the US dollar and multinational banks as the core is becoming unbalanced, the "DAO governance + RWA assets" proposed by HTX DAO will be the core path to building a new financial civilization interface.

RWA: The core battlefield for reconstructing the financial order, why must the heavy responsibility fall on the shoulders of HTX DAO?

RWA is not a simple tokenization of assets, but a structural transformation of real assets actively incorporating on-chain governance, fair trading and global collaboration mechanisms. Molly emphasized that on-chain is not equivalent to decentralization, and the real change lies in the reshaping of governance and the reconstruction of the distribution mechanism brought about by the intervention of DAO. As an ecosystem with the trinity advantages of "real assets + encryption architecture + governance model", HTX DAO already has the ability and resources to take the lead in the RWA direction:

  • Resource level: Huobi HTX Exchange and TRON public chain provide high-performance infrastructure for the issuance, circulation and liquidation of RWA assets;

  • Governance level: Through the veHTX mechanism, Snapshot voting and community proposal system, clear, transparent and censorship-resistant multi-level governance is achieved;

  • Distribution level: Relying on the KOL ecosystem, Launchpool mechanism and extensive community mobilization capabilities, asset subscription and dissemination are accelerated.

How will HTX DAO build a closed loop of RWA ecology

For the future layout in the direction of RWA, HTX DAO plans to promote the construction of six modules, covering asset discovery mechanism, governance standardization, governance-distribution linkage, closed-loop mechanism of income, risk response system and ecological expansion and external collaboration mechanism. These modules will ensure that the entire process of proposal, review, launch, income distribution and risk management of the RWA project is on the chain, and governance and audit transparency are achieved.

For $HTX holders, DAO governance is no longer a technical term, but a co-governance system of asset destiny with real participation, real decision-making and real profit sharing. HTX DAO plans to establish a veHTX mechanism and profit distribution structure in the future. $HTX holders can obtain veHTX by locking positions, thereby obtaining voting, governance and profit sharing rights, deciding whether the RWA project will be launched, and controlling the profit ratio and execution cycle.

Moving forward in resonance with the Hong Kong Stablecoin Bill policy, building a new era of finance

Just before this conference, the Hong Kong Legislative Council officially passed the Stablecoin Bill, establishing a complete compliance issuance and trading system for fiat-backed stablecoins (FRS). This move makes Hong Kong one of the first regions in the world to establish stablecoin legislation. Justin Sun, a core contributor to HTX DAO, global advisor to Huobi HTX, and founder of TRON, forwarded the relevant content on X to express his support for the progress of Hong Kong's stablecoin legislation.

HTX DAO highly praised the progress of this legislation, believing that it not only built a sustainable regulatory framework for stablecoins, but also provided a solid legal basis for the combination of RWA assets and on-chain governance systems.

2025 will be the first year of stablecoin legislation, and Hong Kong will stand at the forefront of the global wave of digital finance. HTX DAO is building an open and shared decentralized asset governance ecosystem with DAO governance as the engine and RWA assets as the bridge.

"We are not building a DAO, we are building a civilization interface." As Molly said, HTX DAO will continue to expand the ecological boundaries as a builder, resonate with Hong Kong and global compliance policies, and build a new era of finance that truly belongs to the community and serves the value of entities.

About HTX DAO
As a multi-chain deployed decentralized autonomous organization (DAO), HTX DAO demonstrates an innovative governance approach. Unlike traditional corporate structures, it adopts a decentralized governance structure composed of diverse groups, working together to promote the success of this organization. Its unique ecosystem advocates open values ​​and encourages all ecological participants to make suggestions that can promote the development of HTX DAO.

Contact information

Official website: www.htxdao.com

Email: [email protected]

data.title: Are long-term Bitcoin holders starting to sell?
data.description:
Author: Matt Crosby; Source: Bitcoin Magazine; Compilation: BitpushNews

After a period of volatility, Bitcoin has now recaptured the $100,000 mark and hit a new all-time high, injecting new confidence into the market. But as prices rise, a key question also arises: Are Bitcoin's most experienced and successful holders - long-term holders - starting to sell?

This article will analyze how on-chain data reveals the behavior of long-term holders, and whether recent profit-taking is a cause for concern or just a healthy part of Bitcoin's market cycle.

Signs of profit-taking

**Spent Output Profit Rate (SOPR)** provides instant insight into realized profits across the entire network. Focusing on recent weeks, we can clearly observe an upward trend in profit realization. The clustering of the green bars suggests that a significant number of investors are indeed selling Bitcoin to realize profits, especially after the price rose from the $74,000–75,000 range to a new high of over $100,000.

Figure 1: Spent output profit rate suggests significant profit realization recently.

However, while this may raise concerns about overhead resistance in the short term, it must be understood in the broader on-chain context. This behavior is not uncommon in bull markets and cannot be used alone as a signal of a cycle top.

Long-term holder supply is still growing

“Long-term holder supply” refers to the total amount of Bitcoin held by wallets that have held for more than 155 days, and this indicator continues to rise despite the surge in prices. This trend does not necessarily mean that new buying is currently taking place, but rather indicates that Bitcoin is “aging” into long-term holdings over time without being transferred or sold.

Figure 2: Bitcoin long-term holder supply has increased significantly.

In other words, many investors who bought in late 2024 or early 2025 are still holding on and are turning into long-term holders. This is a healthy dynamic that typically occurs in the early or mid-stage of a bull market that has not yet shown signs of mass distribution.

HODL Waves Analysis

To further drill down, we used HODL Waves data, which is stratified by the age of wallets. Focusing on wallets that have held coins for 6 months or more, we find that more than 70% of the Bitcoin supply is currently controlled by medium- to long-term holders.

Figure 3: HODL Waves analysis shows that medium- and long-term investors hold the majority of Bitcoin.

Interestingly, although this proportion is still high, it has begun to decline slightly, indicating that some long-term holders may be selling, even though the supply of long-term holders is still growing. The main driving force behind the growth of long-term supply seems to be the gradual "aging" of short-term holders into the coin holding range of more than 155 days, rather than large-scale purchases of new funds.

Figure 4: Long-term holder supply change rate is inversely related to Bitcoin price.

Using raw data provided by the Bitcoin Magazine Pro API, we analyzed the change rate of long-term holder balances classified by wallet age. When this indicator declines significantly, it often coincides with cycle tops in history. Conversely, when this indicator rises sharply, it often corresponds to market bottoms and deep accumulation phases.

Short-term changes and distribution ratios

To improve the accuracy of these signals, the data can be more finely segmented by comparing "recent holders (0-1 month)" with "medium-term holders (1-5 years)". This comparison of the age distribution of coins can provide more frequent and real-time insights into distribution behavior.

Figure 5: The age distribution ratio of coins provides valuable market insights

We found that when the ratio of 1-5 year holders relative to new holders drops sharply, it often coincides with the top of Bitcoin prices in history. Conversely, when the ratio rises rapidly, that is, more Bitcoin flows into the hands of more experienced investors, it is often a precursor to major price increases.

Changes in the behavior of long-term investors is one of the most effective ways to assess market sentiment and the sustainability of price fluctuations. Historical data shows that long-term holders often outperform short-term traders in terms of profitability by buying in panic and holding on for the long term. By analyzing the age distribution structure of Bitcoin, we can more accurately capture market tops and bottoms without relying on price action or short-term sentiment.

Conclusion

At present, long-term holders have only slightly sold, far from the scale seen at the tops of previous cycles. There is indeed some profit taking, but the pace at which it occurs appears to be completely controllable and a healthy market environment.

Given the current bull market stage and the participation of both institutional and retail investors, the data suggests that we are still in a structurally strong phase, and prices still have room to rise further on the back of continued inflows of new funds.

data.title: SlowMist: Analysis of the $230 million theft from Cetus
data.description:
Background

On May 22, according to community news, Cetus, a liquidity provider in the SUI ecosystem, was suspected of being attacked, the depth of the liquidity pool dropped significantly, and multiple token trading pairs on Cetus fell, with an estimated loss of more than 230 million US dollars. Subsequently, Cetus issued an announcement saying: "An incident was detected in our protocol. For safety reasons, the smart contract has been temporarily suspended. At present, the team is investigating the incident. We will issue a further investigation statement soon."

After the incident, the SlowMist security team intervened in the analysis and issued a security reminder. The following is a detailed analysis of the attack method and fund transfer.

(https://x.com/CetusProtocol/status/1925515662346404024)

Related information

One ​​of the attack transactions:
https://suiscan.xyz/mainnet/tx/DVMG3B2kocLEnVMDuQzTYRgjwuuFSfciawPvXXheB3x

Attacker address:
0xe28b50cef1d633ea43d3296a3f6b67ff0312a5f1a99f0af753c85b8b5de8ff06

(Attack sequence diagram)

  • Tick Lower limit: 300000 (price: 60,257,519,765,924,248,467,716,150)

  • Tick upper limit: 300200 (price: 60,863,087,478,126,617,965,993,239)

  • Price range width: only 1.00496621%

Let's analyze why the attacker was able to exchange huge liquidity with 1 Token. The core reason is that there is an overflow detection bypass vulnerability in the checked_shlw in the get_delta_a function. The attacker took advantage of this and caused a serious deviation in the system's calculation of how much haSUI actually needed to be added. Because the overflow was not detected, the system misjudged the amount of haSUI required, resulting in the attacker only needing a few tokens to exchange for a large amount of liquid assets, thus achieving the attack.

When the system calculates how much haSUI is needed to add such a huge amount of liquidity:

The key here is that the implementation of the checked_shlw function is seriously flawed. In fact, any input value less than 0xffffffffffffffff << 192 will bypass the overflow detection. However, when these values ​​are shifted left by 64 bits, the result exceeds the representation range of u256, and the high-order data is truncated, resulting in a result much smaller than the theoretical value. As a result, the system underestimates the number of haSUI required in subsequent calculations.

  • Error mask: 0xffffffffffffffff << 192 = a very large value (about 2^256-2^192)

  • Almost all inputs are smaller than this mask, bypassing overflow detection

  • The real problem: when n >= 2^192 , n << 64 will exceed the u256 range and be truncated

The attacker constructed an intermediate value liquidity * sqrt_price_diff = 6277101735386680763835789423207666908085499738337898853712:

  • is smaller than the error mask, bypassing the overflow detection

  • but after being left shifted 64 bits, it will exceed the u256 maximum value, resulting in the excess part being truncated

  • left;">The final calculation result is approximately less than 1, but because it is rounded up, the quotation is equal to 1

4. Finally, the attacker removed the liquidity and obtained huge token income:

  • First removal: 10,024,321.28 haSUI

  • Second removal: Obtained 1 haSUI

  • Third removal: Obtained 10,024,321.28 haSUI

5. The attacker returned the flash loan, with a net profit of approximately 10,024,321.28 haSUI and 5,765,124.79 SUI, and the attack was completed.

Repair by the project party

After the attack, Cetus released a repair patch. For specific repair code, please refer to: https://github.com/CetusProtocol/integer-mate/pull/7/files#diff-c04eb6ebebbabb80342cd953bc63925e1c1cdc7ae1fb572f4aad240288a69409.

The repaired checked_shlw function is as follows:

Repair instructions:

  • Correct the incorrect mask 0xffffffffffffffff << 192 to the correct threshold 1 << 192

  • Correct the judgment condition from  n > mask  to  n >= mask

  • Ensure that when the left shift of 64 bits may cause overflow, the overflow flag can be correctly detected and returned

MistTrack analysis

According to analysis, the attacker 0xe28b50cef1d633ea43d3296a3f6b67ff0312a5f1a99f0af753c85b8b5de8ff06 made a profit of approximately US$230 million, including SUI, vSUI, USDC and other assets.

We found that the attacker prepared the Gas Fee two days ago, and then made an attempt before the attack, but failed:

We found that the attacker prepared the Gas Fee two days ago, and then made an attempt before the attack, but failed:

We found that the attacker prepared the Gas Fee two days ago, and then made an attempt before the attack, but failed:

We found that the attacker prepared the Gas Fee two days ago, and then made an attempt before the attack, but failed:

style="text-align:center">

Among them, 5.2341 WBNB cross-chain to BSC address 0x89012a55cd6b88e407c9d4ae9b3425f55924919b：

The attacker will also 24,022,896 SUI Transfer to new address 0xcd8962dad278d8b50fa0f9eb0186bfa4cbdecc6d59377214c88d0286a0ac9562, not transferred out yet:

Fortunately, according to Cetus, with the cooperation of the SUI Foundation and other ecosystem members, the stolen funds of US$162 million on SUI have been successfully frozen.

(https://x.com/CetusProtocol/status/1925567348586815622)

Next, we use the on-chain anti-money laundering and tracking tool MistTrack to analyze the address 0x89012a55cd6b88e407c9d4ae9b3425f55924919b on the EVM that receives cross-chain funds.

This address received 5.2319 BNB on BSC and has not yet transferred it out:

This address received 3,000 on Ethereum USDT, 40.88 million USDC, 1,771 SOL and 8,130.4 ETH.

Among them, USDT, USDC and SOL are exchanged for ETH through coW Swap, ParaSwap, etc.:

Next, the address will transfer 20,000 ETH to the address 0x0251536bfcf144b88e1afa8fe60184ffdb4caf16, not transferred out yet:

The current balance of this address on Ethereum is 3,244 ETH:


MistTrack has added the above related addresses to the malicious address library. At the same time, we will continue to monitor the address balance.

Summary

This attack demonstrates the power of math overflow vulnerabilities. The attacker selected specific parameters through precise calculations and exploited the defects of the checked_shlw function to obtain billions of liquidity at the cost of 1 token. This is an extremely sophisticated math attack. The SlowMist Security Team recommends that developers strictly verify the boundary conditions of all math functions in smart contract development.

data.title: Huobi HTX celebrates Bitcoin Pizza Day and opens a new chapter in Web3 global consensus
data.description:
On May 22, 2025, the crypto industry ushered in an epoch-making moment.

The 15th Bitcoin Pizza Festival arrived as scheduled, and the price of BTC broke through the $110,000 mark, setting a record high; on the same day, the highly anticipated TRUMP dinner was held, and Sun Yuchen, the global consultant of Huobi HTX and the largest holder of $TRUMP, officially attended, once again pushing crypto assets into the mainstream focus of global attention. To commemorate Bitcoin’s extraordinary journey of leading global financial innovation over the past 15 years and to further strengthen its deep connection with community users, HTX DAO and Huobi HTX, with an offline celebration in both cities and a million-dollar online incentive, jointly presented a crypto feast that moves from community consensus to mainstream recognition.

Two cities linked to pay tribute to the 15th anniversary of Bitcoin Pizza Festival

On the day of Pizza Festival, HTX DAO, together with community members and ecological partners, held exclusive offline activities for Pizza Festival in Shenzhen and Beijing to pay tribute to the 15th Bitcoin Pizza Festival.

The "Interstellar Pizza Delivery Train" at Shenzhen Station took the lead, and HTX DAO customized luxury cars to shuttle through the city to deliver pizza to users, recreating the classic moment of "10,000 Bitcoins for Pizza" in 2010.

The Beijing station has created a dreamy "BTC Town" interactive game, where users can immersively experience Bitcoin "mining, poker, and consumption". At the same time, through tasks such as checking in and taking photos, they can win exquisite prizes such as HTX DAO limited peripherals and Dragon Boat Festival special gift boxes.

Not only that, Huobi HTX has also launched the "Global 12 Cities" Pizza Festival in Chengdu, Hubei, Wenzhou, Taiwan, Vietnam, Bangkok, Bangladesh, Indonesia, India, Sri Lanka[1] and other countries and regions, inviting users to enjoy free pizza.

This series of pizza festivals across the globe echoed Sun Yuchen's attendance at the Trump dinner, linking the historical intersection of Eastern community consensus and Western mainstream politics. It is a tribute to Bitcoin's fifteen-year journey of leading financial innovation, a collective declaration of crypto civilization moving towards the mainstream, and a manifestation of HTX DAO and Huobi HTX's firm practice in promoting the global consensus of Web3.

Online carnival, millions of USDT benefits ignite community enthusiasm

In terms of online activities, Huobi HTX, together with diamond sponsors JUST Protocol, SunPump, APENFT, BitTorrent, WINkLink, Steem and platinum sponsors Levva and ChainGPT, launched an online "Crypto Pizza Festival, Just in Huobi" themed aggregation welfare event, covering spot, contract, C2C, earning coins, community interaction and other scenarios, with a cumulative reward of nearly one million USDT, fully releasing the platform's ecological advantages and community feedback sincerity.

This online carnival attracted nearly 2 million participants, with more than 1 million participants in the pizza carnival user red envelope event alone, and nearly 200,000 USDT was awarded. It not only led to a significant increase in user activity, but also further deepened the ecological synergy and resource linkage between the platform and Web3 projects.

Inheriting the spirit of encryption: building a global Web3 future

Fifteen years ago, "10,000 Bitcoins for pizza" opened the legend of cryptocurrency; today, the aroma of pizza is still there, but it carries the taste of the entire Web3 era.

In the future, HTX DAO and Huobi HTX will continue to focus on users and deepen the Web3 ecosystem with a global perspective, and continuously inject new momentum into promoting the compliance and mainstreaming of the encryption industry.

data.title: Singularity 3.0 Conference: Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud Ecosystem Expansion New Milestone
data.description:
Guildford, UK – 21 May 2025 – The international forum “Singularity 3.0: Where AI Meets Web3 and Games”, co-hosted by Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud (Endless) and the University of Surrey Blockchain and Metaverse Applications Academy (SABMA), has come to a successful conclusion.

The event, held at Wates House at the University of Surrey, brought together global thought leaders, industry pioneers, academics and innovators to discuss the convergence of artificial intelligence, Web3 technology and immersive games. Singularity 3.0 not only amplifies the Endless Protocol’s vision to empower creators, developers and communities, but also consolidates its position as the cornerstone of the next generation digital economy.

Since the launch of the mainnet in March 2025, Endless has continued to promote rapid product iteration and ecosystem expansion, and has reached strategic cooperation with well-known industry-university-research institutions such as Alibaba Cloud and the University of Surrey to promote the rapid implementation of cutting-edge technologies; then launched a $1 million developer incentive plan in April this year to promote AI innovation and the transformation from Web2 to Web3. Now, many projects have participated in the application of this developer incentive plan.

In addition, at the Dubai Token 2049 series of events, Endless officially released its AI white paper "Endless AI: A Decentralized Intelligent Creator Ecosystem", which elaborated on its vision and strategy of integrating AI and Web3 technologies to promote decentralized innovation.

As a leading decentralized infrastructure platform for applications such as AI, Web3, games and content, Endless will redefine the digital ecosystem. This event is a critical moment in the construction of the Endless ecosystem and a catalyst for ecological cooperation among all parties. The event promotes diversified exchanges and groundbreaking cooperation among Web3, AI and multiple industries, and demonstrates its role as the best infrastructure for AI-driven, decentralized and gamified innovation. Professor Xiong Yu, Co-Chair of Endless and Associate Vice-President of the University of Surrey Star-studded guest lineup: the transformative potential of AI, Web3 and games

The forum invited guests from many well-known institutions such as Stability AI, Google, and Microsoft, whose insights illuminated the transformative potential of AI, Web3 and games. From the opening speech by Professor Yu Xiong of the University of Surrey to the closing coffee and networking session, Singularity 3.0 demonstrated the power of academic and industry collaboration in shaping the digital future. The guests also looked forward to the arrival of cross-field cooperation.

Professor Yu Xiong, Co-Chair of Endless and Associate Vice-President of the University of Surrey, said that the development and commercialization of AI and web3 are inseparable from excellent products and high-quality platforms, and the cooperation between Endless and the University of Surrey is the embodiment of a strong alliance.

Senior Advisor of the Endless Foundation Neeraj Sharma expressed his expectation for Endless as a decentralized infrastructure for AI and game content in the future, and believed that the cooperation between multiple parties would bring about a promising technological change. Rohitha Bogollagama, former Foreign Minister of Sri Lanka, also delivered a keynote speech at the conference, sharing his vision and profound thoughts on the future and development of AI.

Neeraj Sharma, Advisor, Endless Foundation

Luffa, a decentralized social application based on the Endless protocol, also attended the event. Oliver Venables, product director of Luffa, said that social networking is a scenario with high user frequency and full of interpersonal interaction networks, and is very suitable as a convergence platform for applications such as games and content. Luffa's mini-programs and super groups are good interactive entrances for games and content applications.

Oliver Venables, Luffa Product Director

These keynote speeches and panel discussions sparked heated discussions on decentralized identity, asset ownership, generative AI ethical frameworks, and new models of virtual economy. The event's carefully planned startup showcase highlighted applications at the intersection of AI, Web3 and the metaverse. Attendees, including students, researchers, and early-stage entrepreneurs, had the opportunity to interact directly with industry leaders, fostering connections that will drive future collaborations in the Endless ecosystem.

Endless: The Best Infrastructure for AI, Web3, and Gaming

Singularity 3.0 was more than just a forum, it was a catalyst for the expansion of the Endless ecosystem. By bringing together notable organizations such as Google, Microsoft, Animoca Brands, Stability AI, and the Blockchain Game Alliance, the event provided a vibrant platform for building strategic partnerships, showcasing cutting-edge applications, and driving conversations about the future of intelligent decentralized systems. This collaboration highlights Endless Protocol’s commitment to building a robust user-centric infrastructure that combines AI-native tools with blockchain technology for privacy, security, co-creation, and digital ownership.

“Singularity 3.0 is a transformative moment for Endless,” said Neeraj Sharma, Advisor to the Endless Foundation, the event’s organizer. "By bringing together the best minds in AI, Web3, and gaming, we are laying the foundation for new collaborations that will accelerate ecosystem growth. The tangible value that Endless brings to creators, developers, and the global community as the best infrastructure for these converging technologies was fully demonstrated at this event."

Endless stands at the forefront of the Web3 revolution, providing a fully decentralized infrastructure layer designed to enable the next wave of digital innovation. By seamlessly integrating AI-native tools with blockchain technology, Endless enables an intelligent, modular digital ownership, governance, and co-creation platform. Its commitment to privacy, security, and user empowerment makes it an ideal foundation for AI, Web3, and gaming applications, positioning it as a key enabler of the decentralized digital economy.

The success of Singularity 3.0 highlights Endless' ability to convene global stakeholders and drive substantive progress in these rapidly evolving fields. The event paved the way for new partnerships, use cases, and innovations, further expanding the Endless ecosystem and solidifying its leadership at the convergence of AI, Web3, and gaming.

About Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud

Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud is a decentralized smart protocol dedicated to connecting the Web2 and Web3 ecosystems, providing developers with a one-stop Web3 application development platform, and providing users with a Web2-level experience. Based on the public chain of the Move language, Endless integrates a variety of AI capabilities and plug-ins, and is committed to becoming the best connector between AI and Web3. It allows developers to build encrypted AI applications more simply and quickly in a modular way, promoting the arrival of AI agent super-intelligent systems.

Website: https://www.endless.link/

Twitter: https://x.com/EndlessProtocol

Telegram: https://t.me/EndlessProtocol

Media Contact:

Email: [email protected]

Contact: Victor Lau

Company Name: Endless Foundation

data.title: Singularity 3.0 Concludes Successfully, Marking a Milestone for Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud Ecosystem Expansion
data.description:
Guildford, UK – May 21, 2025 – The international forum Singularity 3.0: The Convergence of AI, Web3, and Gaming, co-hosted by Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud (Endless) and the Surrey Academy for Blockchain and Metaverse Applications (SABMA) at the University of Surrey, concluded successfully.

Held at the Wates House in University of Surrey, the event brought together global thought leaders, industry pioneers, academics, and innovators to explore the convergence of artificial intelligence, Web3 technologies, and immersive gaming. Singularity 3.0 not only amplified Endless Protocol’s vision of empowering creators, developers, and communities but also solidified its position as a cornerstone of the next-generation digital economy.

Since its mainnet launch in March 2025, Endless has driven rapid product iteration and ecosystem growth, forging strategic partnerships with leading institutions such as Alibaba Cloud and the University of Surrey to accelerate the deployment of cutting-edge technologies. In April, Endless introduced a $1 million developer incentive program to spur AI innovation and facilitate the transition from Web2 to Web3, with multiple projects already applying for the initiative. Additionally, during the Token 2049 events in Dubai, Endless unveiled its AI Whitepaper, Endless AI: A Decentralized Intelligent Creator-Centric Ecosystem, outlining its strategy to integrate AI and Web3 technologies to foster decentralized innovation.

As a leading decentralized infrastructure platform for AI, Web3, gaming, and content applications, Endless is redefining digital ecosystems. Singularity 3.0 marked a pivotal moment in Endless’ ecosystem development, serving as a catalyst for cross-industry collaboration and showcasing its role as the premier infrastructure for AI-driven, decentralized, and gamified innovation.

Professor Yu Xiong, Co-president of Endless and Associate Vice-President at the University of Surrey

Stellar Lineup of Speakers: Unlocking the Transformative Potential of AI, Web3, and Gaming

The forum featured distinguished speakers from organizations such as Stability AI, Google, and Microsoft, whose insights illuminated the transformative potential of AI, Web3, and gaming. From Professor Yu Xiong’s opening remarks to the closing coffee and networking session, Singularity 3.0 underscored the power of academic-industry collaboration in shaping the digital future. Attendees expressed enthusiasm for upcoming cross-disciplinary partnerships.

Professor Yu Xiong, Co-president of Endless and Associate Vice-President at the University of Surrey, emphasized that the development and commercialization of AI and Web3 technologies hinge on exceptional products and high-quality platforms. The collaboration between Endless and the University of Surrey exemplifies a powerful synergy, he noted.

Neeraj Sharma, Board Advisor (Strategy & Operations) of Endless, expressed an optimistic view about Endless’ future as a decentralized infrastructure for AI and gaming content, anticipating groundbreaking technological advancements through concerted collaboration. Rohitha Bogollagama, former Foreign Minister of Sri Lanka, delivered a keynote speech at the event, sharing his visionary insights and profound reflections on the future and evolution of AI.

Neeraj Sharma, Board Advisor (Strategy & Operations) of Endless

Representatives from leading tech firms highlighted the potential of AI-Web3 synergies. Tomer Amir, Technical Program Manager at Google, explored AI’s impact on scalable, user-centric technologies. Indranil Das, Director of Digital Advisory at Microsoft, emphasized strategies for scaling AI and Web3 applications.

The future of gaming and Web3 was another key focus. Robby Yung, CEO of Animoca Brands, shared forward-thinking perspectives on blockchain’s role in gaming and digital ownership. Melanie Dow, Communications and Partnerships Lead at the Blockchain Game Alliance, examined the intersection of blockchain and interactive entertainment. Tanguy Dewavrin, Founder of StarPal / Atom Stars, showcased the future of AI-driven gaming worlds. Michael Harding from Foundation Venture, shared how iconic brands like Louis Vuitton and Adidas are successfully leveraging Web3 gaming to drive innovative sales strategies and deepen customer engagement.

Luffa, a decentralized social application built on the Endless Protocol, also participated in the event. Oliver Venables, Luffa’ Product Director, noted that social platforms, characterized by high-frequency user engagement and rich interpersonal interaction networks, are ideally suited to serve as convergence hubs for gaming and content applications. Luffa’s mini-programs and super groups provide excellent entry points for interactive gaming and content experiences.

Oliver Venables, Luffa’ Product Director

Academics and financial experts broadened the discussion to blockchain, AI, and governance. Dr. Hui Gong, Lecturer at University College London, shared expertise in decentralized finance (DeFi) and blockchain governance. Susana Esteban, Managing Director at FTI Consulting, delved into tokenization and programmable economies. Helen Bentley from Chicago Design School and the audience on-site jointly explored the computer-centered design concept, exploring new paradigms for human-centered programming and product design in the context of AI. Af Malhotra, Founder & CEO of ReN(founded by UK Government) and Chair of ⁠Diversity Economics Institute(DEI), offered insights on diversity and innovation in AI and Web3. Peter Choi, Community Officer of British Computer Society (BCS), moderated discussions on AI trust, scale, and ethics.

The thematic keynotes and panel discussions sparked dynamic conversations on decentralized identity, asset ownership, generative AI ethics, and emerging virtual economies. A curated startup showcase highlighted real-world applications at the intersection of AI, Web3, and the metaverse. Attendees, including students, researchers, and early-stage entrepreneurs, engaged directly with industry leaders, fostering connections to drive future collaboration within the Endless ecosystem.

Endless: The Premier Infrastructure for AI, Web3, and Gaming

Singularity 3.0 was more than a forum—it was a catalyst for Endless’ ecosystem expansion. By uniting giants like Google, Microsoft, Animoca Brands, Stability AI, and the Blockchain Game Alliance, the event provided a dynamic platform for forging strategic partnerships, showcasing cutting-edge applications, and advancing dialogues on the future of intelligent decentralized systems. This collaboration underscored Endless’ commitment to building robust, user-centric infrastructure that integrates AI-native tools with blockchain technology to enable privacy, security, co-creation, and digital ownership.

“Singularity 3.0 was a transformative moment for Endless,” said Neeraj Sharma, Board Advisor of Endless and event organizer. “By bringing together top minds in AI, Web3, and gaming, we laid the groundwork for new partnerships to accelerate ecosystem growth. Endless’ role as the premier infrastructure for these converging technologies was vividly demonstrated, showcasing tangible value for creators, developers, and global communities.”

Endless stands at the forefront of the Web3 revolution, offering a fully decentralized infrastructure layer designed to empower the next wave of digital innovation. By seamlessly integrating AI-native tools with blockchain technology, Endless delivers an intelligent, modular platform for digital ownership, governance, and co-creation. Its commitment to privacy, security, and user empowerment positions it as the ideal foundation for AI, Web3, and gaming applications, cementing its role as a key driver of the decentralized digital economy.

The success of Singularity 3.0 highlighted Endless Protocol’s ability to convene global stakeholders and drive meaningful progress in these rapidly evolving fields. The event paved the way for new partnerships, use cases, and innovations, further expanding the Endless ecosystem and reinforcing its leadership in the convergence of AI, Web3, and gaming.


About Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud

Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud is a decentralized intelligent protocol dedicated to bridging Web2 and Web3 ecosystems, providing developers with a one-stop platform for building Web3 applications and delivering Web2-level user experiences. Built on a Move-language-based public blockchain, Endless integrates advanced AI capabilities and plugins, positioning itself as the optimal connector for AI and Web3. It enables developers to build crypto-AI applications quickly and modularly, paving the way for super-intelligent AI agent systems.

Website: https://www.endless.link/

Twitter: https://x.com/EndlessProtocol

Telegram: https://t.me/EndlessProtocol

Media Contact:

Email: [email protected]

Contact: Victor Lau

Company: Endless Foundation

data.title: Kraken ignites a revolution: 24-hour trading. Is this the end of traditional stock exchanges?
data.description:
On May 22, 2025, the US cryptocurrency exchange Kraken announced that it will launch a revolutionary product " ‌ xStocks ‌" for non-US customers in Europe, Latin America, Africa and Asia - a tokenized version of more than 50 US stocks and ETFs based on the Solana blockchain.

Users can achieve seamless trading of stocks, cryptocurrencies, funds, bonds and fiat currencies on the same platform, supporting ‌

7×24 hours all-weather operation‌, and Backed Finance will host the actual assets and issue 1:1 pegged tokens.

Behind this financial innovation is a fierce collision between the traditional capital market and Web3.0, which may even become the "doomsday countdown" of traditional stock exchanges.‌. This article deeply analyzes the "dimensionality reduction" logic of xStocks from six dimensions: market structure, asset tokenization, ownership revolution, DeFi ecology, exchange competition and regulatory challenges.

1. Seamless trading of all assets: the first shot of dimensionality reduction

Kraken xStocks converts traditional assets such as stocks and ETFs into blockchain tokens, completely opening up cross-border barrier-free transactions among fiat currencies, cryptocurrencies and securities.

Traditional securities trading relies on the collaboration of brokers, custodians and clearing institutions, and is subject to T+2 settlement cycles, cross-border exchange costs and trading hours restrictions (limited to US stock trading hours). xStocks, through Solana on-chain matching and instant settlement, reduces cross-border friction costs to zero, and drives the market structure towards "all-weather, low-friction, global" (Glosten & Milgrom, 1985).

If this model becomes popular, the value chain of traditional custody banks and settlement systems will be reshaped, and blockchain technology intermediaries may become the biggest winners. ‌When stock transactions are completed as instantly as sending WeChat messages, how much room for survival is left for Wall Street's "slow motion" rules? 2. 7×24 hour trading: tearing the time barrier of traditional markets 2. xStocks’ 24/7 trading directly breaks through the “time hegemony” of traditional finance. Investors can adjust their positions in real time when financial reports are released, geopolitical conflicts or sudden decisions of the Federal Reserve are made, thereby improving price discovery efficiency. But hidden dangers also emerge - continuous trading may encourage short-term speculation and noise trading (Madhavan, 2000), and even lead to increased market volatility. To this end, xStocks needs to design an on-chain volatility control mechanism (such as dynamic handling fees and circuit breaker rules), otherwise it may fall into the paradox of "the higher the liquidity, the more uncontrollable the risk".

‌When the New York Stock Exchange closes, your U.S. stock holdings are still jumping on the blockchain - is this freedom or out of control? ‌

3. Web3.0 Ownership Revolution: Your Private Key, Your Stock

xStocks gives users ‌“Absolute Ownership on the Chain”‌: Tokens are directly stored in personal wallets, private keys are controlled independently, and the control of centralized custodians is completely eliminated. Compared with traditional securities accounts, users can prove their positions without trusting third parties, and can transfer xStocks to other DeFi protocols at any time.

This ‌ “Don’t Trust, Verify”” ‌ Web3.0 concept not only reconstructs the way assets are held, but also makes stocks a programmable “financial Lego” - users can use them as collateral to achieve automated liquidation, lending or derivative synthesis.

‌ If stock accounts no longer require banks, what is the value of the “safe deposit box business” of traditional financial institutions? ‌

Fourth, DeFi empowerment: from trading tools to ecological fuel

xStocks is not only an investment target, but also a high-energy fuel for the DeFi ecosystem. Users can invest it in decentralized exchanges (DEX) to participate in liquidity mining, or pledge it on lending platforms to obtain returns, and even build cross-chain arbitrage strategies through stablecoin leverage.

This ‌ “One coin for multiple uses” ‌ asset efficiency far exceeds traditional finance, and completely activates the value potential of stocks. In the future, xStocks may be combined with synthetic assets (Synths) to become the ‌ cornerstone of on-chain financial engineering ‌.

‌When stocks can be mined, borrowed, and cross-chain arbitrage, isn't the "single transaction" model of traditional brokerages the same as a primitive tool? ‌

V. Dimensionality reduction strike record: the life and death speed of traditional exchanges

Data reveals the cruel reality: In 2024, Binance's revenue will be 16.8 billion US dollars, OKX's trading volume will exceed 7 trillion US dollars, and the scale of custodial assets will crush traditional exchanges. If xStocks expands rapidly, traditional players such as the NYSE will face the triple defeat of “time, cost, and scenario”: ‌

  • ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

    • ‌ ‌ ‌

      • ‌ ‌

        • ‌ ‌

          • : On-chain settlement efficiency makes T+2 pale in comparison; Scenario dimension: DeFi ecosystem devours securities application scenarios. Traditional exchanges may be forced to accelerate the launch of their own tokenization services, but the logical contradiction of “centralized institutions issuing on-chain assets” may become the Achilles' heel of digital transformation.

            Sixth, regulatory game: the tightrope of innovation and compliance

            Kraken has explicitly excluded US users and actively negotiated with regulators in many countries to try to promote tokenized stocks in the ‌"Compliance Sandbox"‌. However, the fragmentation of global securities regulations (such as investor suitability and AML rules) remains the biggest obstacle.

            Although the on-chain traceability of blockchain facilitates supervision, how to coordinate cross-border judicial differences and define the legal attributes of tokenized securities still requires the support of a dynamic regulatory framework.

            ‌If the regulatory iron curtain finally falls, will this financial revolution be short-lived or a roundabout breakthrough?

            VII. Challenge: In the era of financial Lego, who will be kicked out of the game?

            Kraken xStocks' ambition goes far beyond trading innovation - it attempts to use blockchain to reconstruct the underlying logic of the global capital market.

            For retail investors, cross-border barriers are lowered and asset efficiency is improved; for the market, price discovery mechanisms and risk management rules are redefined; and for traditional exchanges, this ‌"dimensionality reduction attack"‌ may mean: either self-revolution or becoming a historical fossil.

            ‌When fiat currency, stocks and cryptocurrencies flow seamlessly in the same wallet, what we witness is not only technological iteration, but also an epic migration of power from Wall Street to blockchain. ‌ The only question is: How much time do the overlords of the old world have left to turn around?

data.title: Why are long-term interest rates rising while short-term interest rates remain stable in the global bond market?
data.description:
In recent years, the global bond market has experienced significant fluctuations, especially the rise in long-term bond yields, which has attracted widespread attention. However, this rise does not herald a major shift in inflation expectations, fiscal deficits or Treasury market liquidity, as market rumors have suggested. This article analyzes the bond markets of the United States, Canada, and Germany, and explores the phenomenon of rising long-term interest rates and stable short-term interest rates based on specific data, revealing the driving factors of the steepening of the yield curve and its reflection on macroeconomic fundamentals.

1. The rise in long-term bond yields: market misunderstanding and reality

Recently, long-term yields in major global bond markets have risen significantly. Taking the United States as an example, the 10-year Treasury bond yield climbed from 4.38% on March 27, 2025 to 4.59%-4.60% on May 23, an increase of about 21-22 basis points. The change may seem significant, but it is not unusually drastic. However, the market generally attributes this phenomenon to concerns about the US fiscal deficit, inflation expectations or liquidity in the Treasury market. Although this explanation is common, it lacks sufficient basis. Similar arguments have appeared many times in history, but rarely have they been confirmed by data. For example, in December 2023 and 2024, the market similarly attributed the rise in the 10-year Treasury yield to deficits or inflation, but those concerns ultimately proved to be exaggerated.

Short-term interest rates have not risen in tandem with long-term interest rates. The 2-year U.S. Treasury yield has only risen slightly from 3.97% to around 4.00% during the same period, remaining almost stable. This divergence between long-term and short-term interest rates is not limited to the U.S. Treasury market; it is also evident in the bond markets of Canada and Germany. Canada’s 10-year bond yield is at its highest level since mid-January 2025, around 3.65%, while the 2-year yield rose only slightly to 3.20%. Germany's 10-year government bond (Bunds) yield rose back to 2.60%, while the 2-year yield (Schatz) remained below 2.00%. This global bull steepening suggests that rising long-term interest rates are not a problem for a single market or country, but a common dynamic facing global bond markets.

2. Driving factors of the steepening yield curve

The steepening yield curve is an important feature of the current global bond market. The so-called "bull steepening" refers to the fact that long-term interest rates rise faster than short-term interest rates, causing the slope of the yield curve to increase. This phenomenon is generally associated with the market's reassessment of future economic growth and inflation expectations, but is also significantly affected by central bank policy uncertainty.

1. The institutional inflation bias of the central bank

The policy behavior of the central bank is an important factor affecting the bond market. The Federal Reserve, the Bank of Canada and the European Central Bank (ECB) generally display an institutional bias towards inflation when formulating monetary policy. This bias can be traced back to the 1970s, particularly to the theory of inflation expectations developed under former Federal Reserve Chairman Arthur Burns. This theory holds that inflation is partly due to the psychological expectations of consumers and markets, so central banks tend to prioritize preventing inflation risks when data does not clearly show economic weakness.

Take the Federal Reserve as an example. Market analysis on March 28, 2025 showed that the Federal Reserve’s concerns about inflation caused it to be "hesitant" on the short-term interest rate path. The uncertainty stems from the Federal Reserve's concerns that tariffs could push up prices. Although Federal Reserve officials have publicly stated that the impact of tariffs on consumer prices may be temporary, the experience of "temporary inflation" in 2021 has made them lack confidence in such judgments. Recent data has further exacerbated this uncertainty. For example, in May 2025, Canada's core CPI rose 2.9% year-on-year, higher than the market expectation of 2.7%; the UK CPI rose 2.3% year-on-year, exceeding the expected 2.1%. The data reinforced central banks' vigilance against inflation and pushed up the uncertainty premium on long-term bond yields.

2. Stability of short-term interest rates and fundamentals

Compared with the volatility of long-term interest rates, the stability of short-term interest rates reflects the market's pricing of macroeconomic fundamentals. The 2-year Treasury yield is more sensitive to economic fundamentals, especially as the bull market steepens. The market expects that if economic weakness intensifies, short-term interest rates will have more room to fall than long-term interest rates, so 2-year bonds have become the focus of investors' attention.

For example, in the first quarter of 2025, although US retail sales data performed strongly in March (up 4.0% year-on-year), the benchmark revisions of the US Census Bureau showed that consumer spending in the past few years was overestimated by about 2%. In addition, Target's financial report released in May 2025 showed that the number of shoppers in its physical stores and online decreased, and the amount of per capita spending decreased. This is consistent with signs of weakness in the labor market. Data from the Business Employment Dynamics (BDM) of the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) showed that the U.S. labor market has shown signs of stagnation in 2024, and the revised data on new jobs has continued to decline. The revision range of the non-farm employment report in the first quarter of 2025 averaged -65,000 per month. These data suggest that economic fundamentals are weaker than market expectations, and the stability of the 2-year Treasury yield reflects the market's pricing of an economic slowdown.

3. Synchronicity of global bond markets

The phenomenon of rising long-term interest rates and stable short-term interest rates is not unique to the United States. In Canada, the rise in 10-year bond yields contrasted with the relative stability of 2-year yields, with the yield curve slope increasing from 0.35 in March 2025 to 0.45 in May. The same is true in the German market, where the yield spread between 10-year Bunds and 2-year Schatz widened from 0.50 in February to 0.60 in May. This global synchronicity suggests that the drivers go beyond fiscal or monetary policy in a single country and are closely related to the collective behavior of global macroeconomics and central banks.

3. Historical perspective: Why the market misreads long-term interest rates

Historically, rising long-term bond yields have often been interpreted as market concerns about deficits or inflation, but these interpretations have often proved to be wrong. For example:

  • 1994-1995: The Federal Reserve raised interest rates due to non-existent inflation risks, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to briefly surge to 8.0%, but the economy did not subsequently experience significant inflation.

  • 1999-2000: Greenspan raised interest rates due to inflation concerns during the Internet bubble, and the 10-year yield rose to 6.5%, but then the economy entered a recession caused by the bursting of the Internet bubble.

  • 2008: Soaring oil prices (Brent crude oil prices rose from $70/barrel in 2007 to $140/barrel in 2008) caused the Federal Reserve to worry about inflation and pause interest rate cuts. However, the collapse of Lehman Brothers and AIG forced the Fed to resume drastic rate cuts in September 2008, with the federal funds rate falling from 2.0% to 0.25%.

The situation in December 2023 and 2024 is similar. The 10-year Treasury yields rose to 4.70% and 4.50%, respectively, which the market attributed to deficit concerns and the Fed's "higher and longer" policy. However, the stability of the 2-year yield (about 4.8% in July 2023 and about 4.3% in November 2024) suggests that the market's judgment on economic fundamentals has not changed fundamentally. The current data for 2025 further confirms this: the rise in long-term interest rates is more a reflection of central bank policy uncertainty than a direct result of deficits or inflation.

4. Bull market steepening and market strategy

Against the backdrop of a steepening bull market, two-year bonds have become the focus of market investment due to their sensitivity to economic fundamentals and potential downward space for yields. In contrast, 10-year bonds have become an outlet for uncertainty, with yield fluctuations more reflecting the central bank's policy hesitation. For example, from March to May 2025, the rise in the 10-year Treasury yield was accompanied by stock market volatility (the S&P 500 fell 2.5% in April), while the stability of the 2-year yield indicated that the market's expectations for an economic slowdown remained unchanged.

In terms of market strategy, investors prefer to hold 2-year bonds because short-term bonds have greater capital gains potential amid expectations of a weak economy. Historical data shows that during the steepening of a bull market, the downward range of the yield on the 2-year Treasury bond is usually 2-3 times that of the long-term bond. For example, during the 2008 financial crisis, the 2-year Treasury yield fell from 4.5% in 2007 to 0.8% in 2009, while the 10-year yield only fell from 4.0% to 3.2%.

V. Conclusion

Current dynamics in global bond markets suggest that the rise in long-term bond yields is not a direct result of deficits or inflation expectations, but a combined effect of central bank policy uncertainty and a steepening bull market. The inflation bias of the Federal Reserve, the Bank of Canada and the European Central Bank has led to blurred market expectations about the path of short-term interest rates, pushing up the uncertainty premium on long-term bond yields. At the same time, the stability of the 2-year bond yield reflects the market's rational pricing of economic fundamentals, including signs of a weak labor market and a downward adjustment in consumer spending.

Investors should pay attention to the developments of 2-year bonds as they more accurately reflect macroeconomic and monetary fundamentals. While the volatility in long-term bond yields is eye-catching, it is more the result of central bank "indecision" rather than fundamental changes in economic fundamentals. In the future, we need to pay close attention to employment, retail sales and inflation data to determine whether the economy slows down further and whether the central bank will adjust its policy direction accordingly.

data.title: Report: 90% of institutional players use or explore stablecoins in their operations
data.description:
A report from enterprise-grade digital asset platform Fireblocks shows that 90% of institutional players are using or exploring the use of stablecoins in their operations. The report, released on May 15, surveyed 295 executives from traditional banks, financial institutions, fintech companies, and payment gateways. Nearly half (49%) of respondents said they are already using stablecoins in payments, 23% are conducting pilot tests, and another 18% are in the planning stages.

Only 10% of the institutions surveyed said they have not yet decided whether to adopt stablecoins.

“As customer demand accelerates and use cases mature, the stablecoin race has become a matter of avoiding obsolescence,” Fireblocks wrote.

Current adoption of stablecoins by institutional respondents. Source: Fireblocks

Traditional banks prioritize stablecoins for cross-border payments

As traditional cross-border systems are hampered by higher costs, delays and other inefficiencies, stablecoins have emerged as a strategic solution in emerging market business-to-business (B2B) environments.

The report found that financial institutions, especially traditional banks, ranked cross-border payments as a top priority for using stablecoins. Banks use stablecoins to gain competitive advantage, reduce friction and meet customer expectations.

The report found that 58% of traditional banks use stablecoins for cross-border payments and 28% use stablecoins for collection. 12% of banks use stablecoins to optimize liquidity, and 9% use them for merchant settlements. Another 9% use them for B2B invoices.

Fireblocks said banks see stablecoins as a "path to modernization." The company said that because these assets are pegged to fiat currencies, it is easier to integrate them into existing financial workflows. In addition, stablecoins can provide a lever to help banks regain market share from fintech companies and reduce capital lock-up.

Stablecoin use cases for traditional banks. Source: Fireblock

Transaction speed is considered the biggest advantage of stablecoin use

The survey results show that banks use stablecoins to regain cross-border transaction volume while maintaining existing infrastructure. Fintech companies and payment gateways use digital assets to gain profits and revenue.

Main advantages of stablecoins. Source: Fireblocks

Of the benefits cited by survey respondents, faster settlement was the most prevalent, with 48% of respondents mentioning it.

Other benefits include greater transparency, better liquidity management, integrated payment processes, enhanced security and lower transaction costs.

Ran Goldi, senior vice president of payments and networks at Fireblocks, said stablecoin adoption has moved beyond a simple focus on cost savings and is now seen as a strategic growth driver.

“Our research shows that 90% of companies are moving forward with stablecoin implementation because they see it as a key lever for growth,” Goldi said.

The executive noted that key motivators include expanding into new markets, responding to direct customer needs, and uncovering new revenue opportunities. “Stablecoins have become a driver of business innovation, not just improved efficiency,” he added.

data.title: Why Memecoin is the decentralized engine of cultural activities in the digital age
data.description:
On January 18, 2025, US President-elect Trump announced the launch of his personal memecoin TRUMP on his social media. According to CoinGecko data, TRUMP's market value has risen rapidly, ranking fourth among meme coins in a short period of time, and the highest has risen to US$75.35. This amazing increase and market value performance have made Trump coin the focus of everyone's attention.

One ​​of the purposes of Trump's issuance of TRUMP coins should be to use his influence and topicality to create his own unique identity in the field of cryptocurrency and strengthen his personal brand image. He claimed that the coin aims to "celebrate a leader who does not back down even in the worst circumstances," alluding to the assassination attempt and other incidents he encountered during the campaign. At 7:00 a.m. on May 23, 2025 (late May 22, Eastern Time), it was a glorious night for 220 TRUMP token holders. They won the opportunity to have dinner with US President Trump based on their holdings ranking from April 23 to May 12. It can be said that this is Trump's latest action to empower his TRUMP coin. Some people call it a "conspiracy" between Trump and TRUMP holders, and it is "the pinnacle intersection of encryption and politics". Sun Yuchen participated in the above dinner as the first holder and said that "memecoin has legitimacy and value".

Why is Memecoin a decentralized engine for cultural activities in the digital age? First, memecoin is based on blockchain and smart contract technology, and has initially possessed the characteristics of a cultural empowerment tool.The tamper-proof nature of blockchain can anchor cultural symbols (such as hot memes, IP images) as tokens, realizing the digital confirmation and perceptual expression of cultural values; smart contracts automatically execute rules and can build cultural interaction scenarios. Users can complete cultural exchanges and communication through token transactions, pledges, and other behaviors, such as using tokens to exchange cultural content in virtual communities. Decentralized ledgers allow different cultural symbols to flow freely on the chain. When users participate in the creation and circulation of tokens, they promote the collision and coordination of multiple cultures, form a self-organized cultural communication network, and enable cultural values ​​to be efficiently transmitted and consensus-building under the empowerment of technology.

Second, memecoin can become a cultural empowerment tool, and more importantly, users use tokens as a link to build cultural interaction scenarios. Users can hold online seminars, virtual cultural exhibitions and other activities based on memecoin. Participants can obtain participation rights through token staking and deepen their understanding of cultural symbols in the exchange; they can also jointly complete cultural creation tasks, including but not limited to rewarding original emoticons, jokes and other content with memecoin. The token incentive mechanism drives user collaborative output. In this model, memecoin is not only a transaction medium, but also a "trust bond" for cultural collaboration - users use token circulation to complete the division of cultural tasks, spontaneously form a closed loop of cultural communication in the decentralized community, and let the scattered cultural values ​​​​condense through the consensus mechanism, realizing the empowerment upgrade from symbol communication to value co-creation.

In addition to TRUMP coins, memecoin cultural empowerment has many highlights. Taking MemeCore as an example, users can use its platform to create and share personal memecoins, integrate their own stories into them, and expand cultural communication through transactions and donations. Interaction, using the ranking list to link digital identity with economic value. Another example is some memecoins based on popular anime and game culture. Fans can hold online cosplay competitions. Participants use corresponding memecoins to pay entry fees, purchase props, and complete cultural tasks such as "reproducing classic scenes" to deepen their understanding and dissemination of works. Dunhuang Lingjing also planned to create a MEME pig project. If it is implemented, users can use relevant memecoins to participate in the Dunhuang cultural theme creation challenge and promote new expressions of traditional culture in the digital age.

Another famous project, Boring Ape NFT, is driven by the project party rather than the community. But similar to the above memecoin, its basic function is to confirm cultural symbols through blockchain. Holders can obtain community identity recognition, participate in offline gatherings, art exhibitions and other cultural activities, and can also perform secondary creation based on IP, derive cultural content such as trendy brands and animations, and form a cultural empowerment closed loop of "ownership - creation - dissemination", promote the integration of street culture and crypto art, and become a cultural social currency in the Web3 era. It can be said that there are certain similarities in this regard, and the two may blend with each other.

In traditional society, there are many tools for empowering culture. Specific regional space is also an important tool for empowering traditional culture. Like a historical and cultural city, such as Xi'an, the city itself is a living history and culture textbook. Many historical sites such as the ancient city wall, Terracotta Warriors, and Big Wild Goose Pagoda are scattered throughout the city. Every year, it attracts a large number of tourists from home and abroad. Tourists are in it and experience the grandeur of ancient architecture and the thickness of historical culture. This kind of on-the-spot experience and feeling is something that book knowledge cannot give. The city space of Xi'an provides a natural and powerful carrier for the dissemination and inheritance of ancient Chinese history and culture, allowing culture to shine with vitality on this land.

Specific cultural significance time also plays an important role that cannot be ignored. Traditional festivals are typical representatives. Take the Spring Festival as an example. During the Spring Festival, families reunite, and people post Spring Festival couplets, eat New Year's Eve dinners, visit relatives and friends, and other traditional customs are performed. At this particular time, family concepts, family ties, and elements such as etiquette in traditional culture are infinitely magnified. Generation after generation of people have been influenced by traditional culture in the atmosphere of the Spring Festival and passed on these cultural connotations. The Spring Festival has become an important time node for the inheritance and development of the traditional culture of the Chinese nation, and it continues to empower culture.

For example, many cultural associations are committed to inheriting and promoting specific cultures. For example, some folk culture associations convey folk culture to the public by organizing various folk activities, such as traditional festival celebrations and folk art exhibitions. The members of the association work together, from event planning, organization and implementation to publicity and promotion, and every link embodies everyone's love for traditional culture and determination to inherit it. Through these activities, the influence of folk culture has been expanded, and people's cognition and identification with it have been continuously strengthened.

Memecoin has many similarities and differences with traditional cultural empowerment tools. The similarity is that they both use a certain carrier to spread and strengthen specific cultural connotations. Memecoin uses the Internet and cryptocurrency technology to integrate specific cultural symbols or concepts into it for dissemination; traditional cultural empowerment tools spread traditional culture through their own ways, such as the organization of associations and groups, the physical carrier of regional space, and ritual activities at specific times.

The differences are more significant. From the perspective of the speed and scope of dissemination, memecoin relies on the Internet and the global cryptocurrency market, and its dissemination speed is extremely fast and covers the world. Take Trumpcoin as an example. In a short period of time after its release, its market value rose rapidly, and many cryptocurrency investors around the world participated in it. However, the dissemination speed of traditional cultural empowerment tools is relatively slow, and the scope of dissemination is often limited by factors such as region and participating population. For example, the activities organized by some local folk culture associations may have an influence limited to the local community or a specific group of cultural enthusiasts. From the perspective of participation methods, memecoin participation is open and transparent. As long as there is a network and a certain amount of funds, anyone can participate in the trading and dissemination of related cryptocurrencies. However, traditional cultural empowerment tools, such as joining certain professional cultural associations, may require certain professional knowledge or go through a specific review process; participating in cultural experiences in a specific geographical space may be restricted by geographical location, economic conditions, etc. For example, traveling to Xi'an to experience its history and culture requires paying for transportation, accommodation, etc.

Of course,memecoin and traditional cultural empowerment tools are not mutually exclusive, but complement each other, making cultural activities in the digital era more convenient, richer and more diverse.

In the digital era, memecoin has great potential to become a decentralized tool for cultural empowerment activities. The digital era is characterized by a high degree of integration of digitization and intelligence, extremely fast information dissemination and strong interactivity.memecoin can use the decentralized characteristics of blockchain technology to break the central institution restrictions in traditional cultural communication and empowerment models.For example, some niche cultural creators can create their own cultural cryptocurrency based on memecoin. By linking unique cultural content, such as original works of art and niche music, to the cryptocurrency, fans around the world can support and spread this niche culture by purchasing, holding and trading the currency. Moreover, due to the immutable nature of the blockchain, information such as the copyright of cultural works can be better protected, and the rights and interests of creators can also be guaranteed, further stimulating their enthusiasm for creating and spreading culture.

In terms of virtual cultural communities, memecoin can also play an important role. People can create virtual communities based on their favorite cultural themes and use specific memecoins as circulating currencies within the community. Community members can use the currency to purchase virtual cultural products within the community, such as virtual artworks, game props with cultural themes, etc. This approach can not only enhance the interaction between community members and their sense of cultural identity, but also provide new impetus for cultural innovation and development. For example, in a virtual community with science fiction culture as the theme, creators can issue memecoins related to science fiction culture, so that community members can support them in creating science fiction novels, comics, film and television works, etc., to achieve the diversified development and widespread dissemination of science fiction culture.

When users empower memecoin, they must still assume corresponding social responsibilities to protect the rights and interests of others. Because the memecoin market is highly speculative and uncertain, the price fluctuates greatly. When users participate in related transactions and dissemination, they cannot deliberately create false information to manipulate market prices and mislead other investors. For example, false good news about a memecoin cannot be spread on the Internet to attract uninformed investors to enter the market, thereby raising the price and then leaving the market with profits. This behavior will seriously damage the interests of other investors.

From the perspective of cultural communication, when users spread culture with the help of memecoin, they must ensure the health and legality of cultural content. Memecoin that promotes violence, discrimination, hatred and other bad cultures cannot be spread. For example, if someone tries to create a cryptocurrency that promotes racial discrimination, other users should not only not participate, but also actively resist and report to relevant regulatory authorities. Because the spread of such bad culture will cause great damage to social harmony and stability, and violate basic social responsibilities.

Although it is still facing many challenges and controversies, with the development of technology and the deepening of society's understanding of it,

memecoin has shown unique potential and opportunities in cultural empowerment activities. Its specific technical characteristics, functional uses, and empowerment methods will definitely continue to innovate and develop, and its impact on cultural activities will become more and more profound. If it can be properly regulated and utilized, it is expected to open up new paths for the diversified development and widespread dissemination of culture in the digital age, become a highly influential decentralized cultural empowerment tool, and become a new decentralized engine for cultural activities in the digital age.
